Join Post job

For video editors

Join the editor list

Get discovered for the kind of editing work you actually want: creator channels, short-form social, podcasts, paid social, brands, agencies, studios, and remote teams.

What we collect

  • Portfolio and best clips
  • Editing niches and software
  • Rates, availability, and location
  • Consent for job matches and community updates

Make your fit obvious

The first matching pass is manual, so clear details matter. Share the formats you edit best, the tools you use, and the kind of work you want more of.

  1. Submit the form.
  2. Your row lands in the right Google Sheet tab once the endpoint is configured.
  3. We use the sheet as the early matching queue.

Submissions are routed to the Editors sheet when the Google Apps Script endpoint is configured.

For editors joining early

Editors

How to find remote video editor jobs

Remote editing work is easiest to win when your proof matches the team's content format and your process makes collaboration feel low-risk.
Editors

Where to find video editor jobs

The best video editor opportunities are split across job boards, private communities, creator teams, agencies, referrals, and local production networks.
Editors

How to find video editor jobs

Finding better editing work is less about one job board and more about matching your search, portfolio, and outreach to the format teams need.

A focused editor community and hiring intake surface for recurring video work.
